home.title: Good cards. Great people.
home.intro: A welcoming local meet-up for trading card collectors of every age and experience level — hosted by Danny Tagg Collects.
home.sectionIntro: Bring your binder, discover something new and spend time with people who get just as excited about the hobby as you do.
home.featureOneText: Meet collectors face to face, compare collections and make fair, friendly trades.
home.featureTwoText: Explore cards, sets and collecting styles from across the local community.
home.featureThreeText: New to collecting or years into the hobby? There’s a place for you at the table.
home.storyTitle: Built around the joy of the hobby
home.storyText: Danny Tagg Collects brings collectors together in a relaxed, friendly space where the cards start the conversation.

about.title: Cards bring us together.
about.intro: Antrim Card Club is a welcoming place to share the hobby, grow your collection and meet fellow fans from across the area.
about.mainText: We’re building a genuine local community around collecting. The club creates an easy-going space to browse, talk, trade and learn — without pressure or pretence.
about.mainTextTwo: Whether you’re chasing a favourite character, completing a set, collecting for the artwork or just getting started, you’ll find people who share the excitement.
about.organiserText: Danny is the collector behind the club — bringing energy, knowledge and a real love for the community to every event.

tickets.title: Save your spot.
tickets.intro: Ticket details for the next Antrim Card Club meet will be announced here. Register your interest and we’ll help you stay in the loop.
tickets.eventDescription: Date, venue and admission details are being finalised. Contact Danny for the latest update or to register your interest.

contact.title: Let’s talk cards.
contact.intro: Questions about the club, tickets, trading or getting involved? Send Danny a message.
